name: @sunthetic/andacity
description: An experience-driven travel booking and discovery-first travel planning site offering search modes for destinations, hotels, car rentals, and flights.
engines-annotation: Mostly required by sharp which needs a Node-API v9 compatible runtime

scripts.build.server: qwik check-client src dist && vite build -c adapters/fastify/vite.config.ts
scripts.deploy: echo 'Run "npm run qwik add" to install a server adapter'
scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --loader ./scripts/test/ts-path-loader.mjs --test src/lib/date/date-input.test.ts src/lib/entities/routing.test.ts src/lib/search/search-entity.test.ts src/lib/search/normalizeSearchResults.test.ts src/lib/search/search-cache.test.ts src/lib/booking/bookable-entity.test.ts src/lib/booking/bookingSession.test.ts src/lib/booking/adapters/bookingAdapters.test.ts src/lib/inventory/resolveInventory.test.ts src/lib/inventory/detectPriceDrift.test.ts src/lib/providers/flight/flightProviderAdapter.test.ts src/lib/providers/hotel/hotelProviderAdapter.test.ts src/lib/providers/car/carProviderAdapter.test.ts src/lib/checkout/getTripCheckoutReadiness.test.ts src/lib/checkout/getCheckoutSessionSummary.test.ts src/lib/checkout/compareCheckoutSnapshotToResolvedInventory.test.ts src/lib/checkout/checkoutRevalidationGate.test.ts src/lib/payments/paymentEligibility.test.ts src/lib/confirmation/confirmation-domain.test.ts src/lib/itinerary/itinerary-domain.test.ts src/lib/ownership/ownership-domain.test.ts src/lib/trips/trip-item-snapshot.test.ts src/lib/trips/trip-assembly-engine.test.ts src/lib/trips/revalidate-trip-items.test.ts src/lib/trips/trip-page-model.test.ts src/server/entities/loadBookableEntityPage.test.ts src/server/entities/addBookableEntityPageToTrip.test.ts src/server/search/buildSearchRequest.test.ts src/server/search/routeParser.test.ts src/server/search/loadCanonicalFlightSearch.test.ts src/server/search/loadCanonicalFlightSearchPage.test.ts src/server/search/loadCanonicalHotelSearch.test.ts src/server/search/loadCanonicalHotelSearchPage.test.ts src/server/search/loadCanonicalCarSearch.test.ts src/server/search/loadCanonicalCarSearchPage.test.ts src/server/search/mapFlightResultsForUi.test.ts src/server/search/mapHotelResultsForUi.test.ts src/server/search/mapCarResultsForUi.test.ts src/server/search/searchService.test.ts src/server/search/searchResultsApi.test.ts src/components/search/flights/flightResultsRendererModel.test.ts src/components/search/hotels/hotelResultsRendererModel.test.ts src/components/search/cars/carResultsRendererModel.test.ts src/fns/travelers/travelers-validation.test.ts src/fns/saved-travelers/saved-travelers-domain.test.ts src/fns/recovery/recovery-mapping.test.ts src/fns/my-trips/my-trips-dashboard.test.ts
